CVE-2024-24786.title: The protojson.Unmarshal function can enter an infinite loop when  ...
CVE-2024-24786.summary: The protojson.Unmarshal function can enter an infinite loop when unmarshaling certain forms of invalid JSON. This condition can occur when unmarshaling into a message which contains a google.protobuf.Any value, or when the UnmarshalOptions.DiscardUnknown option is set.
